function v(v)return w[v-(609980+-558526)]end for v,J in ipairs({{-303394-(-303395);596221+-595649};{1019667+-1019666,1028333+-1028224},{643285-643175,-551231+551803}})do while do local v=table.concat local J=string.sub local E=string.char local b=table.insert local n=string.len local N=math.floor local f=w local L=type local return(function(w,E,b,n,N,f,L,s,G,y,x,l,S,J,P,Q,A,d,R,j,o,K)G,o,Q,l,d,J,K,A,S,j,s,P,x,y,R=function(w)l[w]=l[w]-(-236084+236085)if l[w]==-578417+578417 then l[w],x[w]=nil,nil end end,function(w,v)local
